not_found: This campaign does not exist or has been deleted.
not_active: This campaign is not currently available.
already_cancelled: This campaign has already been cancelled.
not_owner: You can only manage your own campaigns.
only_draft_activate: Only draft campaigns can be activated.
payment_already_authorized: Payment is already being processed. The campaign will be activated automatically.
no_payment_to_refund: No payment to refund for this campaign.
not_paid: This campaign has not been paid for yet.
distribution_date_required: Please set at least one distribution date.
no_slots: There are no more available slots for this campaign.
procedures_required: Procedures are required for this campaign mode.
amazon_link_required: The product link is required for this campaign mode.
day_of_week_required: The day of the week is required for recurring distribution.
specific_date_required: The date is required for a specific date distribution.
cannot_update_active_sessions: Cannot update an active campaign with ongoing sessions.
cannot_cancel_active_sessions: Cannot cancel campaign with {count} active test session(s). Wait for sessions to complete or be cancelled.
